violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegan noodles) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with brown biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

The cutting block at the grill station and the wooden plates are in poor repair, with large gaps, splintering, and missing pieces. These food contact surfaces are not smooth or easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
Hot water was not available at the handwashing sink in the kitchen (upstairs). Hot water must be available for hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Please email inspector proof of certification. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine upstairs and ice machine downstairs) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machines were taken out of service and must not be used until they are cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Ragu sauce was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods were reviewed with the person in charge. Ragu was placed in an ice bath with an ice wand in it at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

Hot water was not available at the handwashing sink in the kitchen. Hot water must be available for handwashing. The person in charge turned on the hot water during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
